Hard payloads, full Ghidra DBs/backups, raw captures, copied executables, secrets, build output, package output, local proof paths, and raw manifests remain local/ignored per LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md.

runtimeProofBoundary.musicStatus: Music live-bundle readiness tooling is integrated as fail-closed/pre-arm only. Producer coverage can be complete, but the public gate reports readyToRunLiveAttempt=false, liveArmAllowed=false, runtimeAudibleOutputProof=false, and preArmReadiness.status=prearm-readiness-not-proven. There is no accepted live BEA audible-output bundle; future live execution must wait on explicit authority, leases, an empty isolated proof root, no preexisting BEA/CDB processes, and capture span/flush/decode-window readiness.
runtimeProofBoundary.musicFollowupScope: Read-only follow-up adds no runtime proof. Producer coverage is schema/producer coverage only, pre-arm permission is permission to attempt only, public gate roots are not root-readiness proof, and executor receipts/stdout remain private.
runtimeProofBoundary.onlineMultiplayer: not player-ready; Host/Join remains disabled until required distinct-endpoint command-source proof and source-bound copied-runtime causality proof are both accepted
runtimeProofBoundary.releaseStatus: v1.0.7 is the current published portable WinUI ZIP; use README.MD and release/readiness/winui_zip_release_v1_0_7_2026-06-25.md for release evidence instead of live state detail.

nextSteps: Keep static RE mutation paused unless a product/runtime contradiction points back to a specific RE issue.
Treat PatchBenchLaunchPresetText as integrated presentation-only UI work; future PatchBench receipt/source-summary extraction needs primitive projection design before implementation.
Use the rebuild front-door chain map as routing documentation only; do not claim runtime, visual, gameplay, rebuild, or no-noticeable-difference parity from it.
Do not run live BEA/CDB/audio proof without explicit runtime-proof authority, leases, private proof-root readiness, arm phrase, and cleanup validation.
Keep local Ghidra, proof, copied-runtime, and payload details as maintainer-local descriptors or ignored overlays, not tracked state.
